=== finger printing ===

This encompasses various tools related to knowing not only the tools the target uses but also the versions of those tools


Some common ones are 

[[./nmap/nmap.wiki|nmap]] for various things
[[https://github.com/EnableSecurity/wafw00f|wafw00f]] for WAFs
[[https://builtwith.com|buildwith]], [[https://sitereport.netcraft.com/|netcraft]] and [[https://www.wappalyzer.com/|wappalyzer]] websites for getting technologies a website is using
[[https://github.com/urbanadventurer/WhatWeb|WhatWeb]] for getting technologies a website is using, it is not updated often
